title: Intelligence Brief
subtitle: 'Anatomy of the .claude/ folder' hits 460 HN pts, 'Go hard on agents, not on your filesystem', insanely-fast-whisper surges to +1,370 stars/day

insights.text: 'Anatomy of the .claude/ folder' hits 460 HN pts — the most popular Claude Code story of the week. Developer tooling internals are now content. The community doesn't just use the tool, they study how it's built.
'Go hard on agents, not on your filesystem' (258 HN pts) — the agent-first development philosophy crystallizes into a direct manifesto. Stop organizing files. Start orchestrating agents.

insanely-fast-whisper surges to +1,370 stars/day (11.5K total) — local speech processing enters the same viral velocity tier as agent frameworks. The on-device AI stack is assembling: inference (Hypura), speech (Whisper), agents (deer-flow).

'Make macOS consistently bad unironically' reaches 378 HN pts — developer frustration with platform regression hits a new amplitude. The community routes around it: terminal-first workflows, cross-platform tools, self-hosted alternatives.

Velxio 2.0 (136 HN pts) — emulate Arduino, ESP32, and Raspberry Pi 3 in the browser. Hardware prototyping goes zero-install. The browser-as-platform thesis continues to absorb traditionally native domains.

deer-flow sustains at +2,394/day (49.3K stars, Day 5) — ByteDance's multi-agent framework shows no deceleration. The big tech agent race enters a sustained velocity phase rather than a spike-and-fade pattern.

AMD Ryzen 9 9950X3D2 packs 208MB cache into a single chip (121 HN pts) — hardware continues to remove AI inference bottlenecks from the bottom up. More cache means more model parameters stay resident. Local AI gets faster without algorithmic changes.

Nashville library launches Memory Lab for digitizing home movies (142 HN pts) — the preservation-digitization wave reaches public institutions. Cultural infrastructure meets consumer nostalgia at the local library.

headlines.text: 'Anatomy of the .claude/ folder' hits 460 HN pts
'Go hard on agents, not on your filesystem'

takeaway.text: Today's brief covers the most interesting signals across the tech landscape.
